name: Golden Eagle Golf Club
address: 16146 W Eagle Lake Rd, Fifty Lakes, MN 56448
about: Golden Eagle Golf Club is an 18-hole championship style golf course situated on 210 acres of a former private preserve, offering spectacular views from elevated tees. The course is designed in harmony with its majestic north woods surroundings, utilizing forests, wetlands, and dramatic elevation changes to create a challenging yet accessible experience for all skill levels. Under new management by SVN | Northco Golf and Resort, the club operates with a focus on 'Spectacular Golf and Spectacular Hospitality.' The facility includes a driving range, large practice putting green, a beautiful clubhouse with a pro shop, bar, and grill, and views of the golf course and Eagle Lake.
why_golfers_like_it: Spectacular views from elevated tees across the north woods landscape
Variety of tee boxes to accommodate all skill levels from challenging to fun-friendly
Full-service clubhouse with pro shop and casual dining options with scenic views
Rated in the top 2% nationally for pace of play
Hosts tournaments and outings with dedicated event management

food_and_drink.notes: On-site bar and grill for casual dining available in the clubhouse.
Full bar service available in the clubhouse; no carry-on coolers or outside alcohol permitted.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs to play?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, the club is likely to offer rentals. Specific rental details should be confirmed by contacting the pro shop.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, Golden Eagle prohibits carry-on coolers or any other personal alcohol, food or beverage. All refreshments must be purchased from the club.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Golden Eagle Golf Club has been rated in the top 2% nationally for its pace of play, though specific hole times are not provided.

faq.question: Is the golf course kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the course offers junior rates for players aged 10 through 18 and is designed to be fun and friendly from the forward tees, making it suitable for families.
